title: Sericolea papuana
taxonomy: Sericolea papuana is classified within the family Celastraceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet family. It belongs to the order Celastrales, which is a group of plants characterized by their small, often inconspicuous flowers. Sericolea papuana is further classified as a genus within the family Celastraceae, and its classification is closely related to other genera such as Euonymus and Celastrus. The specific classification of Sericolea papuana is still a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to revision as new information becomes available. Overall, the classification of Sericolea papuana is an important aspect of its biology and ecology.
